calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Tamara Rosselli, General Manager for Plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Stephanie Davis.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 10, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three (3) Day Notice to Terminate Tenancy dated 08/28/08-----------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant Stephanie Davis as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. shall recover from defendant Stephanie Davis costs in the amount of $195.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $195.00.

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 34 Sixth Street, #302, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Off Calendar
